en: Then all the people of Israel came out, from Dan to Beersheba, including the land of Gilead, and the congregation assembled as one man to the LORD at Mizpah.
zh: 於是以色列眾人都出來，從但到別是巴，以及基列地的眾人，都在米斯巴耶和華面前聚集起來如同一人。

en: And the chiefs of all the people, of all the tribes of Israel, presented themselves in the assembly of the people of God, 400,000 men on foot that drew the sword.
zh: 全民的領袖，就是以色列眾支派的領袖，都站在 神子民的會中；拿刀的步兵共有四十萬人。

en: (Now the people of Benjamin heard that the people of Israel had gone up to Mizpah.) And the people of Israel said, "Tell us, how did this evil happen?"
zh: 以色列人說：“這件惡事是怎樣發生的？你們說吧。”

en: And the Levite, the husband of the woman who was murdered, answered and said, "I came to Gibeah that belongs to Benjamin, I and my concubine, to spend the night.
zh: 那利未人，就是被害的婦人的丈夫，回答說：“我和我的妾到了便雅憫的基比亞，要在那裡住宿。

en: And the leaders of Gibeah rose against me and surrounded the house against me by night. They meant to kill me, and they violated my concubine, and she is dead.
zh: 基比亞人民起來攻擊我，在夜間包圍我住的房子攻擊我，有意殺害我；他們把我的妾污辱致死。

en: So I took hold of my concubine and cut her in pieces and sent her throughout all the country of the inheritance of Israel, for they have committed abomination and outrage in Israel.
zh: 我就把我的妾切成塊子，送到以色列的各地業，因為基比亞人在以色列中行了極羞恥的惡事。

en: Behold, you people of Israel, all of you, give your advice and counsel here."
zh: 以色列人哪，你們都要說出你們的意見，也要在這裡提出你們的對策。”

en: And all the people arose as one man, saying, "None of us will go to his tent, and none of us will return to his house.
zh: 於是眾人都起來如同一人，說：“我們當中誰都不回自己的帳棚，誰都不回自己的家。

en: But now this is what we will do to Gibeah: we will go up against it by lot,
zh: 現在我們要這樣對待基比亞人：我們要照著所抽的籤上去攻打他們。

en: and we will take ten men of a hundred throughout all the tribes of Israel, and a hundred of a thousand, and a thousand of ten thousand, to bring provisions for the people, that when they come they may repay Gibeah of Benjamin, for all the outrage that they have committed in Israel."
zh: 我們要從以色列各支派中，每百人抽取十人，每千人抽取百人，每萬人抽取千人，好為人民運送糧食；等他們到了便雅憫的基比亞的時候，就可以照著他們在以色列中所行的一切羞恥的事懲罰他們。”

en: So all the men of Israel gathered against the city, united as one man.
zh: 於是以色列眾人彼此聯合，如同一人，聚集起來攻擊那城。

en: And the tribes of Israel sent men through all the tribe of Benjamin, saying, "What evil is this that has taken place among you?
zh: 以色列各支派打發人到便雅憫的各家去，說：“你們中間怎麼發生了這樣的惡事呢？

en: Now therefore give up the men, the worthless fellows in Gibeah, that we may put them to death and purge evil from Israel." But the Benjaminites would not listen to the voice of their brothers, the people of Israel.
zh: 現在你們要把那些人，基比亞的無賴之徒，交出來，我們好處死他們，從以色列中除掉這惡。”只是便雅憫人卻不肯聽從他們的兄弟以色列人的話。

en: Then the people of Benjamin came together out of the cities to Gibeah to go out to battle against the people of Israel.
zh: 便雅憫人從各城出來聚集，往基比亞去，要與以色列人交戰。

en: And the people of Benjamin mustered out of their cities on that day 26,000 men who drew the sword, besides the inhabitants of Gibeah, who mustered 700 chosen men.
zh: 那時便雅憫人，從各城裡被數點的，共有二萬六千拿刀的，另外被數點的，還有基比亞的居民，共有七百精兵。

en: Among all these were 700 chosen men who were left-handed; every one could sling a stone at a hair and not miss.
zh: 在這些人中，還有七百精兵是善用左手的，個個都能用機弦拋石，毫髮不差。

en: And the men of Israel, apart from Benjamin, mustered 400,000 men who drew the sword; all these were men of war.
zh: 除了便雅憫人以外，以色列人被數點的，共有四十萬拿刀的，個個都是戰士。

en: The people of Israel arose and went up to Bethel and inquired of God, "Who shall go up first for us to fight against the people of Benjamin?" And the LORD said, "Judah shall go up first."
zh: 以色列人就起來，上伯特利去求問 神，說：“我們之中誰應首先上去，與便雅憫人交戰呢？”耶和華說：“猶大應首先上去。”

en: Then the people of Israel rose in the morning and encamped against Gibeah.
zh: 以色列人早晨起來，對著基比亞安營。

en: And the men of Israel went out to fight against Benjamin, and the men of Israel drew up the battle line against them at Gibeah.
zh: 以色列人出來，要與便雅憫人交戰；以色列人在基比亞面前列陣等待他們。

en: The people of Benjamin came out of Gibeah and destroyed on that day 22,000 men of the Israelites.
zh: 便雅憫人從基比亞出來，那一天使二萬二千以色列人倒地身亡。

en: But the people, the men of Israel, took courage, and again formed the battle line in the same place where they had formed it on the first day.
zh: 眾民，就是以色列人，都奮勇起來，又在頭一天列陣的地方列陣。

en: And the people of Israel went up and wept before the LORD until the evening. And they inquired of the LORD, "Shall we again draw near to fight against our brothers, the people of Benjamin?" And the LORD said, "Go up against them."
zh: 事前，以色列人上伯特利去，在耶和華面前哀哭直到晚上，然後求問耶和華，說：“我們再去與我們的兄弟便雅憫人交戰，可以不可以？”耶和華說：“你們可以上去攻打他們。”

en: So the people of Israel came near against the people of Benjamin the second day.
zh: 第二天，以色列人就前去攻打便雅憫人。

en: And Benjamin went against them out of Gibeah the second day, and destroyed 18,000 men of the people of Israel. All these were men who drew the sword.
zh: 便雅憫人第二天也從基比亞出來，迎戰以色列人，又使一萬八千以色列人倒地身亡，都是拿刀的。

en: Then all the people of Israel, the whole army, went up and came to Bethel and wept. They sat there before the LORD and fasted that day until evening, and offered burnt offerings and peace offerings before the LORD.
zh: 以色列眾人，就是全體人民，又上到伯特利，坐在耶和華面前哀哭，那日禁食直到晚上，然後在耶和華面前獻上燔祭和平安祭。

en: And the people of Israel inquired of the LORD (for the ark of the covenant of God was there in those days,
zh: 那時， 神的約櫃在那裡。

en: and Phinehas the son of Eleazar, son of Aaron, ministered before it in those days), saying, "Shall we go out once more to battle against our brothers, the people of Benjamin, or shall we cease?" And the LORD said, "Go up, for tomorrow I will give them into your hand."
zh: 那時，亞倫的孫子、以利亞撒的兒子非尼哈，侍立在約櫃前供職。以色列人求問耶和華，說：“我們應再出去與我們的兄弟便雅憫人交戰呢？還是休戰呢？”耶和華說：“你們應上去，因為明天我必把他們交在你們手中。”

en: So Israel set men in ambush around Gibeah.
zh: 以色列人在基比亞四周設下伏兵。

en: And the people of Israel went up against the people of Benjamin on the third day and set themselves in array against Gibeah, as at other times.
zh: 第三天，以色列人又上去攻打便雅憫人，在基比亞前面列陣，像前兩次一樣。

en: And the people of Benjamin went out against the people and were drawn away from the city. And as at other times they began to strike and kill some of the people in the highways, one of which goes up to Bethel and the other to Gibeah, and in the open country, about thirty men of Israel.
zh: 便雅憫人也出來迎敵，他們被引出城外，在兩條大路上，一條通往伯特利，一條通往基比亞，像前兩次一樣，動手殺敵，在田間殺死以色列人約有三十個。

en: And the people of Benjamin said, "They are routed before us, as at the first." But the people of Israel said, "Let us flee and draw them away from the city to the highways."
zh: 便雅憫人說：“他們仍像前一次一樣，敗在我們面前了。”以色列人卻說：“我們逃跑吧，引他們離開城市出到大路上來。”

en: And all the men of Israel rose up out of their place and set themselves in array at Baal-tamar, and the men of Israel who were in ambush rushed out of their place from Maareh-geba.
zh: 以色列眾人都從自己的地方起來，在巴力．他瑪列陣；以色列的伏兵，從基比亞西邊埋伏的地方衝出來。

en: And there came against Gibeah 10,000 chosen men out of all Israel, and the battle was hard, but the Benjaminites did not know that disaster was close upon them.
zh: 全以色列中的精兵，有一萬人前來攻打基比亞，戰爭非常激烈；便雅憫人還不知道災禍快要臨到他們的身上了。

en: And the LORD defeated Benjamin before Israel, and the people of Israel destroyed 25,100 men of Benjamin that day. All these were men who drew the sword.
zh: 耶和華在以色列人面前擊敗了便雅憫人；那天以色列人消滅便雅憫人，共二萬五千一百名，都是拿刀的。

en: So the people of Benjamin saw that they were defeated. The men of Israel gave ground to Benjamin, because they trusted the men in ambush whom they had set against Gibeah.
zh: 這樣，便雅憫人就看出自己被擊敗了。原來以色列人倚靠在基比亞前面設下的伏兵，就對便雅憫人詐敗。

en: Then the men in ambush hurried and rushed against Gibeah; the men in ambush moved out and struck all the city with the edge of the sword.
zh: 伏兵急忙衝入基比亞，用刀擊殺了全城的人。

en: Now the appointed signal between the men of Israel and the men in the main ambush was that when they made a great cloud of smoke rise up out of the city
zh: 以色列人與伏兵預先約定，就是從城裡放火，以煙氣上升為號。

en: the men of Israel should turn in battle. Now Benjamin had begun to strike and kill about thirty men of Israel. They said, "Surely they are defeated before us, as in the first battle."
zh: 以色列人在戰場上撤退的時候，便雅憫人就動手殺人，刺死以色列人約三十個，心裡說：“他們真的像頭一次戰陣一樣，在我們面前被擊敗了。”

en: But when the signal began to rise out of the city in a column of smoke, the Benjaminites looked behind them, and behold, the whole of the city went up in smoke to heaven.
zh: 當煙柱信號從城中上升的時候，便雅憫人就轉身觀看，只見全城煙火沖天。

en: Then the men of Israel turned, and the men of Benjamin were dismayed, for they saw that disaster was close upon them.
zh: 那時，以色列人又轉身回來，便雅憫人就非常驚慌，因為看見災禍臨到自己身上了。

en: Therefore they turned their backs before the men of Israel in the direction of the wilderness, but the battle overtook them. And those who came out of the cities were destroying them in their midst.
zh: 他們在以色列人面前轉身，向曠野的路上逃走，戰爭卻緊隨著他們；那些從各城裡出來的人也在他們中間消滅他們。

en: Surrounding the Benjaminites, they pursued them and trod them down from Nohah as far as opposite Gibeah on the east.
zh: 以色列人包圍了便雅憫人，從挪哈 追趕他們，踐踏他們，直到基比亞 對面日出之處。

en: Eighteen thousand men of Benjamin fell, all of them men of valor.
zh: 便雅憫人中倒斃的共有一萬八千人，全都是勇士。

en: And they turned and fled toward the wilderness to the rock of Rimmon. Five thousand men of them were cut down in the highways. And they were pursued hard to Gidom, and 2,000 men of them were struck down.
zh: 其餘的人轉身，向著曠野逃跑，到了臨門的磐石那裡；以色列人在大路上除滅了他們五千人，追趕他們直到基頓，又擊殺了他們二千人。

en: So all who fell that day of Benjamin were 25,000 men who drew the sword, all of them men of valor.
zh: 所以那一天便雅憫人倒斃的，共有二萬五千人，都是拿刀的，全部是勇士。

en: But 600 men turned and fled toward the wilderness to the rock of Rimmon and remained at the rock of Rimmon four months.
zh: 剩下的六百人轉身，向著曠野逃跑，到了臨門的磐石那裡，就在臨門的磐石那裡住了四個月。

en: And the men of Israel turned back against the people of Benjamin and struck them with the edge of the sword, the city, men and beasts and all that they found. And all the towns that they found they set on fire.
zh: 以色列人又回到便雅憫人那裡，把全城的人和牲畜，以及一切遇見的，都用刀殺盡；又把他們碰見的一切城市放火燒毀了。
